$comment: Ratchet allowlist for lint-test-integrity.mjs (issue #10718). Each entry grandfathers a disabled real test. Reduce `count` / remove entries as skips are fixed or linked to a tracking issue; the gate fails on unused capacity so the debt only shrinks.

entries.title: two clients on the same agent converge and do not desync
entries.reason: Cross-client convergence e2e — needs two live browser contexts driving one agent with real BroadcastChannel sync; not run in the deterministic ui-smoke lane. Tracked in #10718.

entries.title: Group G2 — user MCP registry CRUD writes
entries.reason: MCP registry CRUD writes 500 under the workerd + PGlite-over-TCP e2e harness (Broken pipe on the 48-col INSERT); passes on real Postgres/Railway. Un-skip when the harness handles workerd writes or the group runs against Railway. Tracked in #10718.
